hero.headline: Remember who actually won.
hero.subheadline: Log every game night, track stats, and settle debates once and for all. Your group's scoreboard, all in one vault.

features.headline: All the tools, none of the spreadsheets

items.title: Score logging
items.description: Log every session in seconds. Who played, who won, and by how much.

items.title: Statistics
items.description: Win rates, high scores, most sessions played. The numbers don't lie.

items.title: Game history
items.description: Every session, forever. Finally settle that argument about who's been on a losing streak.

howItWorks.headline: Up and running before the first dice roll.
howItWorks.subheadline: Four simple pieces. Five minutes to set up. A whole season of bragging rights.

steps.label: Vault
steps.title: Your Vault
steps.description: Your personal scoreboard. You manage the players, the games, and the history. Nobody else touches it.

steps.label: Games
steps.title: Game templates
steps.description: Set up Catan once, use it forever. Define the scoring format, add notes, done. Works for every game in your collection.

steps.label: Players
steps.title: Your crew
steps.description: Add everyone who shows up. Link them to their own Dice Vault account and they'll see their stats automatically — no sharing logins, no fuss.

steps.label: Leagues
steps.title: Competitive leagues
steps.description: Turn any game into a season. Track standings, wins, and history across sessions. Great for long-running rivalries.

group.headline: More fun with your crew.
group.subheadline: Dice Vault works best when everyone's in on it. Connect your players, run a league, keep the rivalry alive.

items.title: Leagues
items.description: Crown a champion. Run a season for any game — standings, stats, and history tracked automatically.

items.title: Connected players
items.description: Link your friends' accounts and they'll see their own stats the moment you log a session. No login sharing needed.

items.title: Shared results
items.description: Brag a little. Share any session result as a public link — no account needed to view it.

items.title: Notifications
items.description: Stay in the loop. Get notified when sessions are logged, invites arrive, or the leaderboard shifts.

credits.headline: Pay for what you use. Nothing else.
credits.subheadline: Every action costs a fixed number of credits. No surprises, no subscriptions.

free.label: credits / month
free.description: 75 free credits land in your vault every month. Enough for a busy game group.

example.title: What fits in 75 credits?
example.description: Set up your group: 1 game template (25) + 1 league (10) + 3 connected players (30) = 65 credits. Then log 2 sessions with the remaining 10 credits.
example.note: Monthly credits refresh each month. Purchased credits never expire — they stack up and stay until you use them.

packs.headline: Top up when you're ready.
packs.subheadline: No subscription. Purchased credits never expire or reset. Buy once, play on.
packs.priceNote: Prices shown are indicative for the EU. Your exact price is determined at checkout based on your region.

methods.title: iDEAL & Bancontact
methods.description: For the Netherlands and Belgium. Pay directly via your own bank.

methods.title: Credit card
methods.description: Visa, Mastercard and American Express — available worldwide.

methods.title: Bitcoin Lightning ⚡
methods.description: Pay with Bitcoin via the Lightning Network. Automatic 10% discount — always.

free.label: Free
free.description: Free forever. Enough for an active group.

cta.headline: Your next game night starts here.
cta.body: Free to join. No credit card needed. Just bring the dice.

placeholder.name: Martijn V.
placeholder.review: Finally we know who actually wins at Catan. The league feature turned our game nights into a proper season.

placeholder.name: Sophie K.
placeholder.review: No more 'I think I won last time.' It's all there. My friends see their own scores the second I log a session.

placeholder.name: Thomas B.
placeholder.review: Takes 30 seconds to log and we've been using it every week for months. The stats are weirdly addictive.

gameTypes.headline: Built for the games you actually play
gameTypes.subheadline: Whatever you track, Dice Vault handles it.

items.title: Points
items.description: Track scores for every player. Perfect for Catan, Ticket to Ride, and anything with a points tally.

items.title: High score
items.description: Only the winner's score matters. Great for arcade-style games and speed rounds.

items.title: Fastest wins
items.description: Race games and speed challenges. Lowest time takes the crown.

items.title: Finish order
items.description: Who came first, second, third? Track placements across every session.

items.title: Last one standing
items.description: Elimination games where the final survivor wins.

items.title: Winner declared
items.description: Card games and hidden-role games where someone wins by declaration.

items.title: Co-op
items.description: The whole group wins or loses together. Optionally track difficulty levels.

items.title: Team vs Team
items.description: Split into teams and track which side comes out on top.

items.title: Secret mission
items.description: Players have hidden objectives revealed at the end. Who pulled it off?
